jsonLd.title: DTDC is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DTDC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
